H1901.derivation: from an unused root akin to H1897 (הָגָה);

H1902.strongs_def: a murmuring sound, i.e. a musical notation (probably similar to the modern affettuoso to indicate solemnity of movement); by implication, a machination

H1905.derivation: or (prolonged) הַגְרִיאxlit Hagrîʼ corrected to Hagrîyʼ; perhaps patronymically from H1904 (הָגָר);
H1905.strongs_def: a Hagrite or member of a certain Arabian clan

H1908.strongs_def: Hadad, the name of an idol, and of several kings of Edom

H1909.derivation: from H1908 (הֲדַד) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); Hadad (is his) help;

H1913.derivation: or הֲדֹרָם; probably of foreign derivation;
H1913.strongs_def: Hadoram, a son of Joktan, and the tribe descended from him

H1916.derivation: from an unused root meaning to stamp upon;

H1917.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H1916 (הֲדֹם);
H1917.strongs_def: something stamped to pieces, i.e. a bit

H1921.strongs_def: to swell up (literally or figuratively, active or passive); by implication, to favor or honour, be high or proud
H1921.kjv_def: countenance, crooked place, glorious, honour, put forth.

H1923.derivation: (Aramaic) from H1922 (הֲדַר)lemma הֲדַּר extra dagesh, corrected to הֲדַר;

H1925.strongs_def: honour; used (figuratively) for the capital city (Jerusalem)

H1926.kjv_def: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.
H1926.usage: glory(7x), majesty(7x), honour(5x), beauty(4x), comeliness(3x), excellency(2x), glorious(1x), goodly(1x)

H1928.derivation: from H1924 (הֲדַר) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); Hadar (i.e. Hadad, H1908 (הֲדַד)) is his help; (i.e. Hadadezer, H1909 (הֲדַדְעֶזֶר))

H1931.derivation: of which the feminine (beyond the Pentateuch) is הִיא; a primitive word, the third person pronoun singular;
H1931.strongs_def: he (she or it); only expressed when emphatic or without a verb; also (intensively) self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are
H1931.kjv_def: he, as for her, him(-self), it, the same, she (herself), such, that (...it), these, they, this, those, which (is), who.
H1931.pos: demonstrative pronoun, third person singular personal pronoun

H1932.strongs_def: {he (she or it); self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are}

H1933.derivation: or הָוָה; a primitive root (compare H183 (אָוָה), H1961 (הָיָה)) supposed to mean properly, to breathe;
H1933.strongs_def: to be (in the sense of existence)

H1934.strongs_def: to exist; used in a great variety of applications (especially in connection with other words)
H1934.kjv_def: be, become, [phrase] behold, [phrase] came (to pass), [phrase] cease, [phrase] cleave, [phrase] consider, [phrase] do, [phrase] give, [phrase] have, [phrase] judge, [phrase] keep, [phrase] labour, [phrase] mingle (self), [phrase] put, [phrase] see, [phrase] seek, [phrase] set, [phrase] slay, [phrase] take heed, tremble, [phrase] walk, [phrase] would.

H1935.strongs_def: grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance)
H1935.kjv_def: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.
H1935.usage: glory(9x), honour(6x), majesty(4x), beauty(1x), comeliness(1x), glorious(1x), goodly(1x), honourable(1x)

H1938.derivation: from H1935 (הוֹד) and H3050 (יָהּ); majesty of Jah;
H1938.strongs_def: Hodavjah, the name of three Israelites

H1940.derivation: a form for the feminine of H3064 (יְהוּדִי);

H1941.strongs_def: Hodijah, the name of three Israelites

H1942.derivation: from H1933 (הָוָא) (in the sense of eagerly coveting and rushing upon;
H1942.strongs_def: by implication, of falling); desire; also ruin
H1942.kjv_def: calamity, iniquity, mischief, mischievous (thing), naughtiness, naughty, noisome, perverse thing, substance, very wickedness.
H1942.usage: calamity(4x), wickedness(3x), mischief(1x), noisome(1x), iniquity(1x), substance(1x), naughtiness(1x), naughty(1x), mischievous(1x)

H1945.derivation: a prolonged form of H1930 (הוֹ) (akin to H188 (אוֹי));

H1949.strongs_def: to make an uproar, or agitate greatly
H1949.kjv_def: destroy, move, make a noise, put, ring again.

H1951.strongs_def: properly, to be naught, i.e. (figuratively) to be (causatively, act) light

H1952.derivation: from the same as H1951 (הוּן) in the sense of H202 (אוֹן);
H1952.kjv_def: enough, [phrase] for nought, riches, substance, wealth.

H1953.derivation: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H8085 (שָׁמַע); Jehovah has heard;

H1954.strongs_def: Hoshea, the name of five Israelites

H1955.derivation: from H3467 (יָשַׁע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has saved;
H1955.strongs_def: Hoshajah, the name of two Israelites

H1956.derivation: from H3498 (יָתַר); he has caused to remain;

H1959.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to shout);

H1960.strongs_def: properly, an acclaim, i.e. a choir of singers

H1961.strongs_def: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
H1961.kjv_def: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (one-) self, require, [idiom] use.

H1964.derivation: probably from H3201 (יָכֹל) (in the sense of capacity);
H1964.strongs_def: a large public building, such as a palace or temple

H1965.strongs_def: {a large public building, such as a palace or temple}

H1966.derivation: from H1984 (הָלַל) (in the sense of brightness);

H1968.strongs_def: Heman, the name of at least two Israelites

H1972.derivation: probably denominatively from H1973 (הָלְאָה)xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh;

H1973.derivation: from the primitive form of the article (hal);
H1973.strongs_def: to the distance, i.e. far away; also (of time) thus far
H1973.kjv_def: back, beyond, (hence,-) forward, hitherto, thence, forth, yonder.
H1973.usage: beyond(5x), forward(5x), hitherto(2x), back(1x), thenceforth(1x), henceforth(1x), yonder(1x)

H1974.derivation: from H1984 (הָלַל) (in the sense of rejoicing);
H1974.strongs_def: a celebration of thanksgiving for harvest

H1976.derivation: from the article (see H1973 (הָלְאָה)xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh) and H2088 (זֶה);

H1978.strongs_def: a walk, i.e. (by implication) a step

H1979.strongs_def: a walking; by implication, a procession or march, a caravan

H1980.derivation: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;
H1980.strongs_def: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
H1980.kjv_def: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad, along, away, forward, on, out, up and down), [phrase] greater, grow, be wont to haunt, lead, march, [idiom] more and more, move (self), needs, on, pass (away), be at the point, quite, run (along), [phrase] send, speedily, spread, still, surely, [phrase] tale-bearer, [phrase] travel(-ler), walk (abroad, on, to and fro, up and down, to places), wander, wax, (way-) faring man, [idiom] be weak, whirl.

H1982.strongs_def: properly, a journey, i.e. (by implication) a wayfarer; also a flowing

H1983.strongs_def: properly, a journey, i.e. (by implication) toll on goods at aroad

H1984.strongs_def: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
H1984.kjv_def: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rage, renowned, shine.
H1984.usage: praise(117x), glory(14x), boast(10x), mad(8x), shine(3x), foolish(3x), fools(2x), commended(2x), rage(2x), celebrate(1x), give(1x), marriage(1x), renowned(1x)

H1986.strongs_def: to strike down; by implication, to hammer, stamp, conquer, disband
H1986.kjv_def: beat (down), break (down), overcome, smite (with the hammer).

H1987.strongs_def: Helem, the name of two Israelites

H1988.derivation: from the article (see H1973 (הָלְאָה)xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh);

H1992.derivation: or (prolonged) הֵמָּה; masculine plural from H1981 (הֲלַךְ);
H1992.kjv_def: it, like, [idiom] (how, so) many (soever, more as) they (be), (the) same, [idiom] so, [idiom] such, their, them, these, they, those, which, who, whom, withal, ye.
H1992.pos: third person plural masculine personal pronoun

H1993.strongs_def: to make a loud sound (like English 'hum'); by implication, to be in great commotion or tumult, to rage, war, moan, clamor
H1993.kjv_def: clamorous, concourse, cry aloud, be disquieted, loud, mourn, be moved, make a noise, rage, roar, sound, be troubled, make in tumult, tumultuous, be in an uproar.
H1993.usage: roar(8x), noise(6x), disquieted(4x), sound(3x), troubled(2x), aloud(1x), loud(1x), clamorous(1x), concourse(1x), mourning(1x), moved(1x), raged(1x), raging(1x), tumult(1x), tumultuous(1x), uproar(1x)

H1995.strongs_def: a noise, tumult, crowd; also disquietude, wealth
H1995.kjv_def: abundance, company, many, multitude, multiply, noise, riches, rumbling, sounding, store, tumult.
H1995.usage: multitude(62x), noise(4x), tumult(4x), abundance(3x), many(3x), store(2x), company(1x), multiplied(1x), riches(1x), rumbling(1x), sounding(1x)

H1996.strongs_def: the multitude of Gog; the fanciful name of an emblematic place in Palestine

H1997.derivation: feminine of H1995 (הָמוֹן); multitude; , the same as H1996 (הֲמוֹן גּוֹג)

H1999.derivation: or (too fully) הֲמוּלָּה; (Jeremiah 11:16), feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to rush (as rain with a windy roar);
